query: Tengo una memoria sobre como funciona el SSH tunnel a MongoDB Compass, pero cuando le pregunto al asistente sobre eso, nunca aparece en el bloque <auto-loaded-memory>. Que chequeo?
expected_behavior: Routes to reference/troubleshooting.md for the recall-failure diagnostic flow
Runs /antares-memory:status FIRST as the entry diagnostic
Tails $ANTARES_STATE/logs/memory-search.log to see last hook activity
Forces a manual search via $ANTARES_VENV_PY scripts/memory-search.py to verify the memory ranks
If it ranks below the 0.35 threshold, suggests rewriting description to match the operator's wording
If it doesn't rank at all, checks whether it was indexed by querying the slug's .memory-index.db
notes: Guards against: jumping straight to 'the memory must not exist'; suggesting a description rewrite before checking the daemon/index; and skipping /antares-memory:status as the first step. The bug is almost always indexing/threshold, not a missing file.
